title: The State-Associated Banks (Miscellaneous Provisions) Act, 1962
full_text: The State-Associated Banks (Miscellaneous Provisions) Act, 1962 राज्य-सहयुक्त बैंक (प्रकीर्ण उपबन्ध) अधिनियम, 1962 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196256 Act Number: 56 Enactment Date: 1962-12-14 Act Year: 1962 Short Title: The State-Associated Banks (Miscellaneous Provisions) Act, 1962 Hindi Title: राज्य-सहयुक्त बैंक (प्रकीर्ण उपबन्ध) अधिनियम, 1962 Long Title: An Act further to amend the State Bank of India Act, 1955, the State Bank of India (Subsidiary Banks) Act, 1959, and the Bankers Books Evidence Act, 1891, and to provide for the winding up of certain minor State-associated banks and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Financial Services Enforcement Date: 01-01-1963 Notification: 1st January, 1963, vide notification No.G.S.R.1781, dated 18th December, 1962, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II sec 3(i) Last Updated: 05-02-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The State-Associated Banks (Miscellaneous Provisions) Act, 1962 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Repealed. Section 3. Repealed. Section 4. Repealed. Section 5. Provisions in respect of the State Bank Dholpur. Section 6. Repealed.
